subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! In this journey, Jinab-i-Amin praised your dignity and steadfastness, saying that the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احباء الله جناب امین در این سفر ستایش از وقار و تمکین شما نمود که احبای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
